content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:9 offers "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!", an explicit quid-pro-quo review incentive.
Pierre: Apple prohibits incentivizing or pressuring users toward specific star ratings, as this manipulates App Store review integrity (5.6.3) and violates 2.3.9. Found in `App/PaywallView.swift:9`. Remove the free-Premium-for-review offer entirely; if you want to prompt reviews, use SKStoreReviewController with no reward attached.
